title: LEGENDARY RT JAVA TEXTURES
description: A Realistic PBR Texture Pack For Minecraft Java Edition
body:
# Legendary RT Java Textures — bring true PBR + POM realism to Minecraft: Java

**Legendary RT Java Textures** is a realistic, high-resolution pack for Minecraft: Java Edition. It ships full **PBR** materials (specular, roughness, metallic), **POM** for convincing 3D depth, and optional **emissives**—so surfaces pick up light and detail the way you expect.
# 
> ## Download options
> **Modrinth:** free **128x** version  
> **Official website:** **256x / 512x / 1024x** premium editions  
> **[Get higher resolutions here](https://legendaryrttextures.com/project/legendary-rt-java-textures)**
# 
![Legendary RT Java Textures](https://legendaryrttextures.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/LRT_RT_28-27.jpg)

## Why it looks so good
- **PBR materials:** lifelike light response with specular, roughness, and metallic maps  
- **POM depth:** convincing height detail without adding geometry  
- **Emissives:** glow where it counts  
- **Shader-friendly:** works great with **SEUS PTGI HRR 2.1**, and plays nicely with **Complementary Unbound**, **Bliss**, and **BSL**

## What you get
- **Resolutions:** free **128×** base pack; **256× / 512× / 1024×** via premium  
- **Compatibility:** **Minecraft Java 1.13+** through the latest release  
- **Requirements:** **OptiFine** or **Iris + Sodium** to enable PBR/POM features

## Add-ons to level it up
Optional packs like **Frosted Glass**, **Overlays** (smooth sand/grass edges), **Dense Grass**, **Realistic Leaves**, **Mobs & Items**, and **Modern Paintings** let you dial in your look.

## Quick install
1. Download the pack (free or premium) from the official site.  
2. Drop the `.zip` into your `resourcepacks` folder.  
3. In-game, enable the pack and load your preferred shader.  
4. In shader settings, toggle **PBR + POM** for the full effect.

## Performance tips
- Start at **256×** if **1024×** feels heavy; scale up once stable.  
- Allocate more RAM, lower render distance/shadow quality, and try **Iris + Sodium** (or tune OptiFine) for better FPS.

**Get it here:** [legendaryrttextures.com](https://legendaryrttextures.com/project/legendary-rt-java-textures)
